name: ethStopPacketGenerator
title: ethStopPacketGenerator
description: Stops the Ethernet packet generator, which was started with EthStartPacketGenerator.

parameters.name: txPacket
parameters.description: The Ethernet packet which was used to start the generator.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
